title: invitations — permissions
description: Permission strings this module publishes. Split by guard: `sanctum` for tenant admins managing their tenant's invitations; `platform_admin` for Academorix ops with cross-tenant audit + revoke authority. Seeded by InvitationsPermissionSeeder with is_system=true.

permissions.name: invitations.viewAny
permissions.description: List + show invitations in the caller's tenant.

permissions.name: invitations.manage_any
permissions.description: Cross-tenant read + audit-revoke for Academorix ops. Scoped to a small platform-admin role tier.

notes: No `invitations.accept` / `invitations.decline` permissions — those routes are public (token-based) and unauthenticated. The token IS the authorization.

Consumer modules may extend with target-specific permissions layered on top of `invitations.send` — e.g. `teams.manage_roster` gates whether a user can invite people to specific teams within a tenant, on top of the base `invitations.send` grant.
